entities.name: Device

fields.name: deviceName
fields.provenance: device name rendered in the pairing confirmation box

fields.name: deviceId
fields.provenance: deviceId read from the query string and echoed in the request

fields.name: state
fields.provenance: opaque CSRF/state token round-tripped to pair-confirm

fields.name: callback
fields.provenance: callback URL displayed + used for post-pairing redirect

entities.provenance: the page renders and submits a single Device pairing record

validation.provenance: client rejects non-https / non-allowlisted callback before POST

effect.assumption: persists the pairing and returns a device token (REST 201 best-practice default)

uiStates.name: Pairing Confirmation
uiStates.description: Shows the device name + what it will be authorized to do, with Connect/Cancel.

uiStates.name: Pairing Error
uiStates.description: Validation failed (missing/invalid state or callback); shows an error message.

auth.provenance: the connect-runner page sits behind the authenticated app shell
